title: PNC beats 2Q earnings forecast but shares fall on lower interest income outlook
text: PNC Financial Services (NYSE:PNC) has reported second-quarter results that beat market expectations but trimmed forecasts for its 2023 net interest income.  The Pittsburgh-based bank posted a 3.5% rise in revenue to $5.29 billion for the three months to June 30, 2023, supported by a 15% year-over-year increase in net interest income to $3.5 billion.

title: PNC Stock Falls. The Regional Bank's Revenue Was a Miss.
text: PNC Financial Services Group earnings were flat year over year, but came in ahead of expectations.

title: PNC Financial's interest income forecast trim clouds upbeat quarter
text: PNC Financial Services Group on Tuesday cut its forecast for full-year net interest income (NII), casting a shadow over the lender's second-quarter earnings beat.

title: PNC's stock slides 3% premarket after revenue falls short of estimates
text: PNC Financial Services Group Inc.'s stock PNC, +1.09% slid 3% in premarket trade Tuesday, after the regional bank's second-quarter revenue fell short of estimates. Pittsburgh-based PNC posted net income of $1.500 billion, or $3.36 a share, compared with $1.496 billion, or $3.39 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: PNC REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2023 NET INCOME OF $1.5 BILLION, $3.36 DILUTED EPS

title: 5+% Yielding No-Brainer Blue-Chips That Could Triple

title: PNC Financial: Buy This 5% Yielding Blue-Chip Bargain Before Everyone Else Does
text: There are many reasons to be worried about the stock market, including recession, inflation, and crazy valuations. title: These 20 banks have had the largest cuts to earnings estimates

title: PNC Financial (PNC) Ups Dividend, Expects SCB to Dip to 2.5%
text: With expectations of a decrease in the SCB for PNC Financial (PNC), the company increases its quarterly dividend by 3.3%. However, it expects to reduce its share repurchase activity.

title: PNC ANNOUNCES STRESS CAPITAL BUFFER (SCB)
text: PITTSBURGH , July 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) last week received the results of the Federal Reserve's 2023 Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR). The Federal Reserve's CCAR disclosure included its estimate of PNC's minimum capital ratios for the period from the first quarter of 2023 through the first quarter of 2025 under the hypothetical Supervisory Severely Adverse scenario.

title: PNC RAISES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND TO $1.55 PER SHARE
text: PITTSBURGH , July 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) declared a quarterly cash dividend on the common stock of $1.55 per share, an increase of $0.05 cents per share, or 3%, from the second quarter dividend of $1.50 per share. The dividend, with a payment date of Aug. 5, 2023, will be payable the next business day to shareholders of record at the close of business July 17, 2023.

title: Which Super-Regional Bank Performed the Best in the Fed's Stress Test?
text: Stress testing is an exercise conducted by regulators to ensure the safety and soundness of the banking system. But it is also important for investors because it helps determine bank capital requirements.
